info.name: EASB - ASB Jakon Module API
info.description: API collection for ASB Jakon Module - managing ASB Jasa Konstruksi (Construction Services) with Excel file upload for bulk creation.

request.description:
Create a single ASB Jakon entry. Requires SUPERADMIN role.

**Request Body:**
- `idAsbTipeBangunan` (number, required): Building Type ID
- `idAsbJenis` (number, required): ASB Type ID
- `idAsbKlasifikasi` (number, required): Classification ID
- `tahun` (number, required): Year
- `type` (enum, required): Type of service - one of: `perencanaan`, `pengawasan`, `management`, `pengelolaan`
- `nama` (string, required): Service name
- `spec` (string, required): Specification
- `priceFrom` (number, required): Minimum price
- `priceTo` (number, required): Maximum price (must be >= priceFrom)
- `satuan` (string, required): Unit (must exist in database)
- `standard` (number, required): Standard value (positive number)

formdata.description: Excel file (.xlsx or .xls) with columns: tipe_bangunan, jenis usulan asb, klasifikasi, type, nama, spec, priceFrom, priceTo, satuan, standard

request.description:
Create ASB Jakon records in bulk by uploading an Excel file. The file must contain exactly 10 columns.

**Request Body (form-data):**
- `tahun` (number, required): Year for the ASB Jakon records
- `file` (file, required): Excel file (.xlsx or .xls) with data rows

**Excel File Format:**
- Header row: tipe_bangunan, jenis usulan asb, klasifikasi, type, nama, spec, priceFrom, priceTo, satuan, standard
- Data rows: Each row should contain values matching existing data in database
- File size: Maximum 10MB
- Type values: Must be one of: perencanaan, pengawasan, management, pengelolaan
- priceTo must be >= priceFrom

**Response:**
Returns the number of records created and the created data array.

Download Excel template file for ASB Jakon bulk upload. The template contains the required headers: tipe_bangunan, jenis usulan asb, klasifikasi, type, nama, spec, priceFrom, priceTo, satuan, standard.

**Response:**
Returns an Excel file (.xlsx) that can be filled with data and uploaded via the Create ASB Jakon Bulk endpoint.

Update an existing ASB Jakon entry. Requires SUPERADMIN role.

**Request Body:**
- `id` (number, required): ASB Jakon ID
- All other fields are optional - only include fields you want to update
- `type` (enum, optional): perencanaan, pengawasan, management, pengelolaan
- `priceTo` must be >= `priceFrom`

Delete an ASB Jakon entry. Requires SUPERADMIN role.

**Request Body:**
- `id` (number, required): ASB Jakon ID to delete

item.name: ASB Jakon Queries

header.description: JWT token for OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role

query.description: Number of records per page (required, minimum: 1)

request.description:
Get paginated list of ASB Jakon entries.

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (number, required): Page number (minimum: 1)
- `amount` (number, required): Number of records per page (minimum: 1)

header.description: JWT token for OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role

request.description:
Get detailed information for a specific ASB Jakon entry.

**Query Parameters:**
- `id` (number, required): ASB Jakon ID
